arts.ttl: Arsenal, Arteta don't need to win title despite disappointing trophy haul - McCoist
arts.sum: Pundit Ally McCoist tells Sports Mole that Mikel Arteta does not need to win the Premier League title with Arsenal this season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle 'agree contract extension' with Arsenal & Liverpool target
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reported to have struck a deal to extend the contract of winger Anthony Gordon amid interest in the England international from both Arsenal and Chelsea. As the transfer window closed, Arsenal emerged as long-term admirers of Gordon but Newcastle officials made it clear they had plans to extend the 23-year-old's contract.

arts.ttl: Forgotten Arsenal star finally finds new club after signing for League Two side
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Carl Jenksinon has been without employment since leaving Australian side Newcastle Jets but is now back in English football after a move to a League Two club

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal star and England international completes surprise move to League Two side Bromley... and could make his debut on Saturday
arts.sum: League Two side Bromley have announced the surprise signing of a former Arsenal star.

arts.ttl: Thanks, Arsenal! Manager delighted with star Arteta regrets selling
arts.sum: Fulham boss Marco Silva has hailed the impact of Emile Smith Rowe at Craven Cottage. The midfielder departed boyhood club Arsenal in the summer after spending the past two seasons mostly on the outside looking in.

arts.ttl: Arsenal to bank '£60m' as new deal struck but announcement won't be until next year
arts.sum: Arsenal’s return to the upper echelons of English European football has brought myriad financial benefits. Seven seasons away from the Champions League meant Arsenal lost...

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 6 Scout Picks: Arsenal triple-up against Leicester
arts.sum: Our final selection ahead of Saturday’s deadline The post FPL Gameweek 6 Scout Picks: Arsenal triple-up against Leicester appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery showed true colours with treatment of ex-Arsenal man
arts.sum: The now-veteran player, who is a free agent currently, recalled: "In pre-season, it's a time where you're playing games and players can be watched, you know, and if players like - it happens a lot in pre-season, managers will go 'Oh you're not in my squad, I don't want you.'" The defender added: "So I went in and I said 'Unai, I could really do with coming on this preseason', he might have been like taking me anyway, but I just wanted to let him know, because as I said it's a shop window for me, it's a time for me to show what I can do for other clubs who will be watching.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'interested' in signing Juventus striker amid contract uncertainty
arts.sum: Rumours swirled throughout the summer that the Gunners were in the market for a new striker to add to Mikel Arteta's squad. According to Tutto Juve, Vlahovic remains a player of interest to Arsenal having previously been linked with a move to the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal star's career reaches new low as Crystal Palace snub becomes clear
arts.sum: The Athletic reports that Rob Holding's absence from the Crystal Palace first team is due to a disagreement following the defeat to West Ham. The defender was reportedly ordered by Glasner to participate in a post-match running session, despite not featuring in the game. Absent from the snapshot, Holding's future at Selhurst Park seems uncertain despite being listed in Palace's Premier League squad.
